hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'scripts/analysis/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"MEMORY UPDATE REQUIRED: An analysis script just finished. Update the relevant memory files in instructions/memory/ (session log, discoveries, pipeline_state, or evc_policy_analysis) with key results, parameter values, and conclusions before moving on."}}' || true
